title: fagara camphorata
intro: Fagara camphorata, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Fagara camphorata include the relief of pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. Fagara camphorata can be prepared into various herbal products such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
